title: Evalicious... So Delicious
excerpt: One of my dear creative partners, Evalicious , sent a marvelous assortment of products to play with. I'm a big fan of puffy stickers in general, and these are no exception. Since I am pressed for time these days, I…
body:
One of my dear creative partners, Evalicious, sent a marvelous assortment of products to play with. I'm a big fan of puffy stickers in general, and these are no exception.

Since I am pressed for time these days, I managed to squeeze an hour of creative time in to create a one page Project Life type of spread. Love their acrylic stamp sets - I mean, how cute is that camera?

The best part of waking up these days is our morning conversations with Jack. He is so cheery and doesn't make a fuss. Once fed, he either falls back asleep or stays up to talk (well, coo) up a storm. It's a special time to savor. The family photo was taken a couple days after the others, but I am not the least bit concerned. So glad I got this documented, and it may just be the way to go these days. I used my Project Life mini kit from Cut & Paste and other supplies from Two Peas In A Bucket and Simon Says Stamp. Here is how the spread turned out:
